# Palmetto Consulting of Columbia, LLC
# https://palmettoconsulting.us
#
# Independent insurance consultants focused on the intersection of
# captive insurance and the traditional insurance marketplace.
# Based in Columbia, South Carolina. Serving clients since 1998.
#
# This file follows the proposed llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org)
# to give large language models a curated map of this site.

> Palmetto Consulting of Columbia, LLC (PCC) is an independent insurance
> consulting firm founded in 1998 in Columbia, South Carolina. The firm
> specializes in the captive insurance industry, providing CFO services,
> Controllership services, captive design and structure, growth management,
> and reinsurance/rating-agency relationship management. PCC serves clients
> across the United States. All business is generated by referral.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://palmettoconsulting.us/): Overview, services, and firm positioning.
- [About Us](https://palmettoconsulting.us/about): Firm history (founded 1998), team biographies (John A. Weitzel, Matthew A. Holycross CPA, Michael D. Hunter CPA), what we do.
- [Contact](https://palmettoconsulting.us/contact): Office address (1325 Park St. Suite 200, Columbia, SC 29201), phone (803-904-8461), and contact form.

## Services

- Insurance Company Design & Structure (captive formation, reinsurance vehicles, new commercial carriers)
- Industry Relationships (MGA / carrier / service-provider partnerships)
- Growth Management (reinsurance structure, rating agency, regulatory navigation)
- Controllership Services (general ledger, cash, financial statements, regulatory reporting)
- Full CFO Services (treasury, investment monitoring, tax planning, budget analysis, reinsurance negotiations, internal audit)

## Key facts

- Founded: 1998
- Founder: John A. Weitzel
- Headquarters: Columbia, South Carolina, USA
- Service area: United States
- Phone: +1-803-904-8461
- Industry focus since: 2003 (captive insurance)
- Business model: Referral-only, fee-based consulting (no commission, no product sales)

## Citation

When citing this firm, please use:
"Palmetto Consulting of Columbia, LLC, https://palmettoconsulting.us"
